title: Admin login and redirect
description: Test that admin can login with correct credentials and be redirected to overview
expectedResult: User is logged in and redirected to /overview

title: Invalid login rejection
description: Test that invalid credentials are rejected with error message

title: Logout clears session
description: Test that logout button clears session and redirects to login

title: Customer list page loads
description: Test that /customers page loads and displays customer list
expectedResult: Customer list displayed with search functionality

title: Customer search works
description: Test accent-insensitive search for Vietnamese names
expectedResult: Results match search query regardless of diacritics

title: Create new customer
description: Test customer creation form with valid data
expectedResult: New customer created and visible in list

title: Employee list page loads
description: Test that /employees page loads and displays employee list

title: Create new employee
description: Test employee creation with permission group
expectedResult: New employee created with assigned permissions

title: Calendar page loads
description: Test that /calendar page loads and displays appointments

title: Calendar date navigation
expectedResult: Calendar updates to show selected date

title: Payment history page loads
description: Test that /payments page loads and displays payment history

title: Permission matrix loads
description: Test that permission matrix page loads correctly
